per_criterion_scores.internal_note: The student clearly defines the problem and breaks it down into specific tasks, such as defining sorting criteria and measuring efficiency.
The student proposes a multi-criteria sorting algorithm but does not specify which algorithms are considered or why they are suitable.
The student accurately identifies relevant constraints, including stability and time complexity.

justification: The student demonstrates comprehensive understanding in framing by clearly defining the problem and identifying constraints, with only minor improvements needed in algorithm selection.
